Your claim status has been updated

Dear Policyholder,

We’ve reviewed your claim #SYN-12345 and have updated its status to Under Review. The next steps are listed below.

  • Submit the attached form by 2026-05-01.
  • Provide a copy of the police report & repair estimate.
  • Visit our portal for additional documents.

For questions, contact your adjuster at adjuster@example.com or visit your claim page.
